DP.536.0000:
How may we serve you today?
Perhaps a spa treatment?\f
Our spa treatment will make your
[0101,0001] grow more friendly.\f
Would you care to have a spa
treatment, [0103,0000]?
DP.536.0001: We hope to see you again.
DP.536.0002:
Ah, yes.
Right this way, please...\f
DP.536.0003:
We’re ready to begin.
Please, relax all your muscles.\f
DP.536.0004:
This oil contains dissolved diamonds
for enhanced effectiveness.\f
DP.536.0005:
This foam contains an extract taken
from pearls.\f
DP.536.0006:
The body’s toxins are forced out with
a foreign massage technique.\f
DP.536.0007:
The salon’s air is perfumed by an
herbal aroma for relaxation.\f
DP.536.0008:
There, all done.
I hope you enjoyed it.
DP.536.0009:
Oh, I do apologize.\f
We can only provide one spa
session a day to our members.
DP.536.0010:
We keep our clients and Pokémon from
seeing others.\f
That way, all our clients and their
Pokémon can fully relax.
DP.536.0011:
Our service is very exclusive.
We only accept five members a day.
DP.536.0012:
We’ve developed a reputation for
bringing our members closer to\r
their Pokémon.
